cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Steven could have gone to the gas station. So, the question is asking between what times he could have gone, given the information about where he was seen at different times. Let me start by listing out all the known time slots where Steven was doing something else, and then see what time slots are free for him to go to the gas station. First, Steven woke up at 7am. But waking up doesn't necessarily mean he was doing something else at that moment; maybe he just started his day. Then, Ashley saw Steven stretching at a yoga studio from 7am to 10am. So from 7 a.m. to 10 a.m., Steven was at the yoga studio. That means he can't be at the gas station during that time. Next, William saw Steven reading at the library from 1pm to 2pm. So from 1pm to 2pm, Steven was at the library. Then, Jennifer saw him working at the office from 2pm to 3pm, which overlaps with the end of his library visit. So from 1pm to 3pm, Steven was either at the library or the office. Then, Michael saw Steven watching a movie at the theater from 3pm to 7pm. That's a long time—four hours. So from 3pm to 7pm, Steven was at the theater. After that, Mary saw Steven waiting at the train station from 7pm to 10pm. So from 7pm to 10pm, he was at the train station.
